caption:
"I'll automate once I'm bigger."

That belief is exactly what keeps the leak open.

Manual follow-up breaks at a specific point: two leads landing in the same hour, or one arriving at 9pm on a Saturday and sitting until Monday.

If leads already stack up after hours, or you check messages "when you get a chance" instead of the second they land, you're past that point right now.

Automation replaces the clock. It fires the first response in under five minutes, so the lead is still warm when you pick up the conversation.

See it run on your own leads before you scale ad spend.
DM TRIAL

#LeadFollowUp #ServiceBusiness #SmallBusinessGrowth #CRM #SpeedToLead
rationale: Carousels still lead saves/depth for B2B educational content in 2026, and this tackles an unclaimed timing objection (delaying automation until 'bigger') distinct from the impersonal and cost objections already shipped.
